reason: Response A fulfills the creative writing request fluently and naturally, even personalizing the signature to "David" to match the user, which reflects the stronger instruction-following and contextual judgment typical of Opus on an open-ended creative task. Response B's literal-minded refusal to roleplay a thank-you note, treating a clearly generic creative prompt as requiring authentic personal experience, reads as the more rigid, over-cautious behavior characteristic of a smaller model like Haiku. The competent, emotionally calibrated prose and confident task completion in A point to it being my (Opus) output.
